name: Muhammad Ali Jinnah
role: Founder of Pakistan; 1st Governor-General (1947–1948)
quote: You are free; you are free to go to your temples, you are free to go to your mosques or to any other place of worship in this State of Pakistan.

name: Liaquat Ali Khan
role: 1st Prime Minister of Pakistan (1947–1951); assassinated Oct 16, 1951
quote: Pakistan is the premier Islamic state and the fulfillment of the dream of millions of Muslims.

name: Field Marshal Ayub Khan
role: President (1958–1969); Pakistan's first military ruler
quote: Democracy is indeed a luxury which the developing nations of Asia and Africa cannot afford.

name: Zulfikar Ali Bhutto
role: PM (1973–1977) / President (1971–1973); PPP founder; executed 1979
quote: If we have to eat grass, even then we will make the atom bomb; we have no other choice.

name: General Zia ul-Haq
role: Chief Martial Law Administrator/President (1977–1988); Islamization architect
quote: Islam is not just a religion, it is a complete code of life. Pakistan was created in the name of Islam and will continue to survive only if it sticks to Islam.

name: Benazir Bhutto
role: Prime Minister (1988–90, 1993–96); world's first female Muslim PM; assassinated Dec 27, 2007
quote: You can imprison a man but not an idea. You can exile a man but not an idea. You can kill a man but not an idea.

name: Nawaz Sharif
role: Prime Minister (1990–93, 1997–99, 2013–17); PML-N founder; 3x ousted
quote: I believe in constitutional rule, in rule of law, in democracy, in freedom of the press.

name: General Pervez Musharraf
role: Chief Executive/President (1999–2008); COAS; War on Terror ally; died Feb 2023
quote: Pakistan first, Pakistan last, Pakistan always.

name: Asif Ali Zardari
role: President (2008–2013, 2024–present); PPP co-chair; widower of Benazir Bhutto
quote: Democracy is the best revenge.

name: Imran Khan
role: Prime Minister (2018–2022); PTI founder; imprisoned since 2023
quote: I feel like a lion who was put behind bars just because he was threatening the corrupt.

name: Shehbaz Sharif
role: Prime Minister (Apr 2022–Aug 2023; Mar 2024–present); PML-N president
quote: Pakistan's economy has been stabilized and we are now on the path to prosperity.

name: General Asim Munir
role: Chief of Army Staff (Nov 2022–present); former ISI Director General
quote: The Pakistan Army will not allow any fitna al-khawarij [referring to TTP] to destabilize Pakistan.

name: Allama Muhammad Iqbal
role: Philosopher-Poet; Allahabad Address 1930; intellectual father of Pakistan
quote: Rise up and create a new world, for the old world is crumbling.

name: Dr. Abdul Qadeer Khan
role: Nuclear scientist; 'Father of Pakistan's nuclear bomb'; ran proliferation network; died Oct 2021
quote: I never had any doubts that what I was doing was right. Pakistan needed a deterrent.

name: Maulana Fazlur Rahman
role: JUI-F chief; Azadi March (2019); PDM head; influential religious-political leader
quote: Democracy is our weapon to fight the establishment's domination.

name: General Yahya Khan
role: President/CMLA (1969–1971); presided over Bangladesh separation; resigned in disgrace
quote: I will crush the rebellion in East Pakistan in the shortest possible time.

name: Bilawal Bhutto Zardari
role: PPP Chairman; Foreign Minister (2022–2024); son of Asif Zardari and Benazir Bhutto
quote: Pakistan is too important to fail. We will not let the political crisis derail our democratic progress.

name: Justice Iftikhar Chaudhry
role: Chief Justice (2005–2007, 2009–2013); dismissed by Musharraf; restored by lawyers' movement
quote: The Constitution is supreme; no army chief, no president, can stand above it.

name: Sheikh Rashid Ahmad
role: Interior Minister (2021–2022); longtime politician; Rawalpindi strongman
quote: Pakistan is like a ship in a storm — sometimes the captain changes, but the army is always the lighthouse.

name: Xi Jinping
role: President of China; CPEC architect; Pakistan's 'iron brother' relationship
quote: Pakistan is China's 'iron brother' — our friendship is higher than the mountains, deeper than the oceans.
